description: Machine-readable extraction of the 5 canonical funnels defined prose-only in the runbook. Each funnel lists ordered steps (event + optional GA4 param filter), the kill-criteria it unblocks, and an evaluable-now verdict against the live 28d window. Operator-only GA4-console/Looker wiring stays in the runbook; this file is the data contract for any future automation (Looker template feed, control-room funnel viz, GA4 Data API report).

live_window.pulled_via: ga4 MCP getEvents (event-level totals; param-filtered steps not resolvable until custom dimensions are registered — see limitations)

limitations: Step-level breakdown by event parameter (e.g. onboarding_step_completed step_index=N) is NOT computable via the GA4 Data API until the operator registers those custom event parameters as custom dimensions in GA4 Admin. Counts below are event-level totals summed across all parameter values.

iOS core-logging + home-alert events (workout_complete, home_action_tap, home_action_completed, home_readiness_alert_*, home_trend_alert_*) show 0 hits because the TestFlight build carrying them has not shipped to testers.

home_readiness_alert_shown / home_trend_alert_shown / home_action_completed exist in FitTracker/Services/Analytics/AnalyticsProvider.swift but are MISSING from docs/product/analytics-taxonomy.csv (taxonomy drift — flagged for analytics-observability follow-up; out of scope for this enhancement).

funnels.name: Onboarding to first workout (Activation)
funnels.evaluable_reason: Top-of-funnel (first_open -> onboarding) has live data; conversion target workout_complete=0 until TestFlight ships core-logging events to testers.

funnels.name: Onboarding drop-off detection

kill_criteria_links.criterion: any step-N -> step-N+1 conversion < 80% triggers kill review

funnels.evaluable_reason: Event-level totals are live (viewed 379 -> completed 193 = 50.9%). Per-step (step_index) breakdown is blocked until step_index is registered as a GA4 custom dimension.

funnels.name: Smart Reminders engagement (C1+C2+C4 surface validation)
funnels.evaluable_reason: All step events show 0 hits — TestFlight build carrying C2/C4 instrumentation has not shipped to testers. Re-run ~14 days after the next TestFlight build.

funnels.name: Web -> app conversion (fitme-story -> iOS install)
funnels.evaluable_reason: DEFERRED until App Store launch. Step 3 needs an install CTA on the showcase site (content_type=app_store_link not yet wired); step 4 needs a real install-attribution ecosystem. Matches runbook Funnel 4 status.

funnels.name: Operator UCC observability (internal)

kill_criteria_links.criterion: operator acknowledges blocker < 1h sustained over 7d (TTC SLO)

funnels.evaluable_reason: Steps 1-2 have live data (warning 5 -> load 9); conversion target dashboard_blocker_acknowledged shows 0 hits in the window (event never fired — acknowledge UI may not be wired or no blocker required acknowledgement in-window).
